operational_knowledge_units.title: Task model tracks tasks sent to the robotics engine and archives completed tasks to task activity
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that all tasks sent to the robotics engine are tracked in the task model, and when a task is completed it is archived to task activity.
